title: Collapsible
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Collapsible wrapper composed from the local Base UI Collapsible primitive, shadcn root/trigger/content slots, local class canonicalization, and deterministic local examples.

examples.title: CollapsibleDemo
examples.description: Order details collapsible with status row and icon trigger shell.

examples.title: CollapsibleBasic
examples.description: Product details card with local Button and Card shells.

examples.title: CollapsibleSettings
examples.description: Settings panel with radius inputs revealed by a trigger.

examples.title: CollapsibleFileTree
examples.description: Nested collapsibles for a file-tree shell.

examples.title: CollapsibleRtl
examples.description: RTL order details layout with local static labels.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Collapsible attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages. The wrapper preserves shadcn slots and classes over the local Foldkit primitive.

deviations.summary: Examples use local static Button, Card, icon, Tab, and RTL shells instead of origin app dependencies.
deviations.rationale: Those components are outside this component slice. Static local markup preserves the relevant Collapsible DOM, class, ARIA, and visual contracts without adding unavailable registry dependencies.
